things.name: Cable Car & SkyBridge
things.description: Cable car to 708m Gunung Mat Cincang with a curved pedestrian sky bridge

things.name: Pantai Cenang Beach
things.description: Langkawi's main beach strip with beach bars, parasailing and watersports

things.name: Kilim Karst Geoforest Park
things.description: UNESCO World Geopark mangrove kayaking with eagles, monkeys and cave bats

things.name: Duty Free Shopping
things.description: Langkawi's tax-free status makes it the best shopping in Malaysia

things.name: Beras Basah Island
things.description: Uninhabited island with the clearest water and best snorkelling in Langkawi

things.name: Telaga Tujuh (Seven Wells Waterfall)
things.description: Seven waterfalls descending through a gorge to a swimming pool

things.name: Crocodile Adventureland
things.description: Crocodile farm with various show performances and a freshwater aquarium

things.name: Dayang Bunting (Pregnant Maiden Lake)
things.description: Freshwater lake inside an island accessible by boat - swimming with monkeys

things.name: Art in Paradise 3D Museum
things.description: Interactive 3D art installations for social media photographs

things.name: Nasi Campur at Warung Tepi Laut
things.description: Malaysian mixed rice with fresh grilled squid at a seaside open-air stall
